decisions: spec-creator skill was not present in .claude or .agents, so the review used the requested general quality criteria.
Eleven active backend-aware specs are implemented in code and covered by the available tests.
project_manager_spec.md is the only reviewed unfinished spec.
The unfinished project_manager scope is limited to Telegram /next and /prev command wiring plus one stale pending-delivery call example.
BRD, implementation order, and dependency graph were used as context, not classified as unfinished module specs.

next_step_input.summary: Move the ready specs to realised; either wire /next and /prev in bot.py with tests or split those commands into a future spec before moving project_manager_spec.md.
